children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this subchapter.

children.heading: Limitation on expenditures for administrative expenses
children.label: b Limitation on expenditures for administrative expenses
children.text: Funds appropriated to carry out this subchapter may not be expended for the payment of expenses incurred by a board to administer an order.
